entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: Short-duration pigeonpea species studied for root development

entities.name: ROOT SYSTEM DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The growth of roots, specifically measured by length and weight

entities.name: ROOT SIMULATION MODEL
entities.description: A model used to predict and estimate root system development

entities.name: DAILY CLIMATIC DATA
entities.description: Daily weather-related data used as input for the root simulation model

entities.name: SOIL PHYSICO-CHEMICAL PROPERTIES
entities.description: Physical and chemical characteristics of the soil used in the simulation

entities.name: DRY MATTER ALLOCATION
entities.description: The distribution of dry matter to roots and shoots

entities.name: DAILY MOISTURE CONTENT
entities.description: The amount of water in the soil at various depths

entities.name: TEMPERATURE
entities.description: The temperature of the soil at various depths

entities.name: CERES-MAIZE MODEL
entities.description: A model whose sub-routines were used to simulate soil moisture and temperature

entities.name: LOGISTIC FUNCTIONS
entities.description: Mathematical functions used to calculate the daily allocation of dry matter
